title: Saurian (disambiguation)
content:
The name '''"saurian"''' referred to:
*A general class of animal life, see [[reptile]]
*creatures from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eiattu 6]], see [[thuvasaur]]
*a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of snake-headed bipeds, see [[Saurian (species)]]
*a non-sentient species of [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavians]]: [[Saurian flier]]s

{{Disambig}}
